title: Eagles Mob Heads!
description: gives every mob a chance to drop there own head.
body:
A mod that adds mob and player heads in minecraft, with most mob variants dropping unique heads! Each makes the representing mobs sounds if placed on a noteblock.

Some mobs have a secret head when there named, such as a pig named TechnoBlade, or a Wither named Wither Storm, view all in gallery.


If using Datapack and want the nametag heads to have sound drop the datapack in the resource packs folder, then enable.
